query: US spot Bitcoin ETF net flows late June 2026 and early July 2026, weekly trend from Farside Investors and SoSoValue. Are net outflows continuing into the week of June 29-July 3 2026? What is the Bitcoin price trend in late June 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**Answer to the core question — Are net outflows continuing into the week of June 29–July 3, 2026?**
- **Yes, early in the week, but the trend reversed.** Outflows continued Monday–Wednesday (Jun 29: −$239.6M, Jun 30: −$242.6M, Jul 1: −$279.3M, the 10th consecutive outflow day), then **broke on Thursday, July 2, with +$221.7M in inflows** — the largest daily intake in two months. FBTC led inflows (~$166M) and ARKB (~$92M), while IBIT still shed −$40.43M.

**Weekly/streak context:**
- The 10-day streak drained ~$2.73B. 2026 has seen two record outflow streaks (10 sessions in May, 13 in June) totaling ~$7.2B, pushing YTD flows to **~−$5.4B** — negative for the first time since the Jan 2024 launch.

**Bitcoin price trend (late June 2026):**
- Clear **downtrend**: BTC fell from ~$66,290 (Jun 15) to a recent low close of $58,559 (Jun 30) and intraday ~$57,748 (Jul 1) — 21-month lows under $58,000.
- **Bounce into early July**: recovered ~7% to ~$62,003 by July 3, coinciding with the ETF inflow reversal. 3-month return −7.36%.

**Data caveat:** Sources differ slightly on July 1 (SoSoValue ~$295M outflow vs. Farside/Bitbo −$279.3M) due to timezone (ET vs. UTC+8) and rounding conventions.

sources.title: Finally. $221 million flow into Bitcoin ETFs, ending a painful 10-day outflow streak
sources.snippet: U.S.-listed bitcoin ETFs saw $221.7 million in inflows on Thursday, their largest daily intake in two months, ending a 10-day streak of outflows. FBTC led with ~$166M; IBIT recorded a $40.43M outflow. YTD net outflows ~$5.4B.

sources.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs record $295M net outflow on July 1, marking 10th consecutive day of outflows
sources.snippet: Per SoSoValue, Bitcoin spot ETFs recorded net outflow of $295M on July 1 (ET), the 10th consecutive day. Top inflow: Grayscale Mini (BTC) +$36.33M; MSBT +$29.81M.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $7B Across Two Record Outflow Streaks in 2026
sources.snippet: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs logged 10 consecutive outflow sessions in May and 13 in June 2026, draining a combined ~$7.2B and flipping YTD flows negative for the first time since launch.

sources.snippet: IBIT drove bulk of redemptions, shedding $300.4M in one session; smaller funds absorbed some inflows during the outflow streak.
